recommendations.title: Lilya 4-ever
recommendations.overview: In a struggling post-Soviet community, Lilya a teenage girl is abandoned when her mother moves to the United States with her boyfriend. Facing neglect and poverty, she meets Andrei, who offers her a job in Sweden, giving her hope for a better life —

recommendations.title: We Are the Best!
recommendations.overview: Three girls in 1980s Stockholm decide to form a punk band—despite not having any instruments, and being told by everyone that punk is dead.

recommendations.title: Mammoth
recommendations.overview: When Leo travels to Thailand on business, he unwittingly sets off a chain of events that will have dramatic consequences for everyone.

recommendations.title: Together
recommendations.overview: Elisabeth leaves her abusive and drunken husband Rolf, and goes to live with her brother, Göran. The year is 1975 and Göran lives in a commune called Together. Living in this leftist commune Elisabeth learns that the world can be viewed from differen

recommendations.title: Given
recommendations.overview: Haruki secretly had feelings for Akihiko for years, but Akihiko was still in a relationship with his roommate, the violinist Ugetsu Murata. Haruki, Akihiko, and Ugetsu's love clashes and starts to move forward.

recommendations.title: Queen Christina
recommendations.overview: Popular monarch Queen Christina of Sweden must choose between love and loyalty to her nation when she unexpectedly falls for a Spanish envoy.

recommendations.title: Waitress
recommendations.overview: A small town waitress stuck in a lousy marriage finds love when an exciting out-of-towner enters her life.

recommendations.title: Shall We Dance?
recommendations.overview: A bored accountant spots a beautiful woman in the window of a ballroom dance studio. He secretly starts taking dancing lessons to be near her, and then over time discovers how much he loves dancing. His wife, meanwhile, has hired a private detective

recommendations.title: Daisies
recommendations.overview: Two teenage girls embark on a series of destructive pranks in which they consume and destroy the world around them.

recommendations.title: Premam
recommendations.overview: Three stages in George's life, and three girls he encounters in each stage.
